metadata.description: Domscribe is a pixel-to-code development tool that maps running UI elements to their exact source locations, capturing runtime context (props, state, DOM) for handoff to coding agents via MCP.

plugins.name: domscribe
plugins.description: Domscribe is a pixel-to-code development tool that maps running UI elements to their exact source locations, capturing runtime context (props, state, DOM) for handoff to coding agents via MCP.
